reviews.comment:
El servicio es malo,maquinas obsoletas y solo dos. Mala atención y siempre falta combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The service is bad, the machines are outdated and there are only two of them. The customer service is poor and they're always out of fuel.

reviews.comment:
Como todo lugar fuera de capital federal es tranquilo, la gente trabaja sin apuros, a veces vamos con el acelere del lugar donde vivimos y nos cuesta bajar.. pero al verlos trabajar despacio, a su ritmo, no queda otra que ajustarse a eso. Bien atendido por las playeras y la sra del shop.

(Translated by Google)
Like any place outside the capital, it's peaceful. People work at a leisurely pace. Sometimes we're rushed back home and find it hard to slow down, but seeing them work slowly, at their own pace, there's no other option but to adjust. The staff and the shopkeeper were very helpful.
